title: ContainerPoolAffinityLock
description: Affinity lock used by container-pool-rs to serialize dispatches into a single warm container per (poolSlug, threadId). Acquired with SET NX + TTL; the value is an opaque ASCII token used by the caller to prove ownership during release. Source: remote/deployments/container-pool-rs/src/main.rs.

$dd:redis.summary: Distributed mutex around dispatch into a warm container, keyed by container pool + thread.

keys.name: ContainerPoolAffinityLockKey
keys.description: Redis key for the per-(pool, thread) dispatch affinity lock. Caller is expected to acquire with `SET <key> <token> NX PX <ttlMs>` and release with a WATCH/MULTI compare-and-delete using the same token.

params.name: prefix
params.description: Configurable lock-key prefix; defaults to 'dd:container-pool:affinity'. Operators may override via CONTAINER_POOL_REDIS_LOCK_PREFIX.

params.name: threadId
params.description: Thread UUID for which the affinity lock is being claimed.

keys.valueDescription: A short ASCII lock token chosen by the caller. Verified on release; mismatched tokens are a no-op.
